name: V1
SQL: CREATE VIEW V1 AS SELECT Customer_Info.customer_id, Customer_Info.age, Customer_Info.gender, Status_Analysis.churn_label FROM Customer_Info JOIN Status_Analysis ON Customer_Info.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id;

name: V2
SQL: CREATE VIEW V2 AS SELECT Payment_Info.customer_id, Payment_Info.monthly_charges FROM Payment_Info;

name: V3
SQL: CREATE VIEW V3 AS SELECT Service_Options.customer_id, Service_Options.tenure, Status_Analysis.churn_value, Customer_Info.senior_citizen FROM Service_Options JOIN Status_Analysis ON Service_Options.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id JOIN Customer_Info ON Service_Options.customer_id = Customer_Info.customer_id;
